argv:
from pathlib import Path
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
s=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
compile(s,str(p),'exec')
required=(
    'KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_CLEANUP_V1_HTML_START',
    'KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_CLEANUP_V1_HTML_END',
    'KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_CLEANUP_V1_JS_START',
    'KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_CLEANUP_V1_JS_END',
    "const WRITER_TASK_MEMORY_KEY='kayock.writer.last_task.v1';",
    'function readWriterTask()',
    'function rememberWriterTask(id)',
    'function writerRecentFallback()',
    'function writerRecentV2()',
    'function openWriterCreatorFromHome',
    'function openWriterRoomFromHome',
    'function continueWriterRecentV2()',
)
missing=[item for item in required if item not in s]
assert not missing, 'missing cleanup markers: '+', '.join(missing)
print('KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_CLEANUP_1_0_PYTHON_AND_MARKERS_OK')
validations.name: Verify Python syntax and Writer cleanup markers

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, os, re, shutil, subprocess, sys, tempfile
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
tree=ast.parse(source)
html_value=None
for item in tree.body:
    if isinstance(item,(ast.Assign,ast.AnnAssign)):
        targets=item.targets if isinstance(item,ast.Assign) else [item.target]
        if any(isinstance(t,ast.Name) and t.id=='HTML' for t in targets):
            html_value=ast.literal_eval(item.value)
            break
assert isinstance(html_value,str), 'HTML constant not found'
blocks=re.findall(r'<script(?:\s[^>]*)?>(.*?)</script>',html_value,flags=re.I|re.S)
assert blocks, 'No embedded JavaScript blocks found'
node=shutil.which('node') or shutil.which('node.exe')
if not node:
    candidate=Path(os.environ.get('ProgramFiles',r'C:\Program Files'))/'nodejs'/'node.exe'
    if candidate.is_file():
        node=str(candidate)
assert node, 'Node.js was not found for embedded JavaScript verification'
temp_path=None
try:
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile('w',suffix='.js',encoding='utf-8',delete=False) as handle:
        handle.write('\n;\n'.join(blocks))
        temp_path=handle.name
    result=subprocess.run([str(node),'--check',temp_path],capture_output=True,text=True,shell=False)
    if result.stdout:
        print(result.stdout)
    if result.stderr:
        print(result.stderr,file=sys.stderr)
    assert result.returncode==0, f'Node syntax check failed with return code {result.returncode}'
finally:
    if temp_path:
        try:
            Path(temp_path).unlink()
        except FileNotFoundError:
            pass
print('KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_CLEANUP_1_0_EMBEDDED_JAVASCRIPT_OK')
validations.name: Verify embedded interface JavaScript syntax with Node
Simulate exact Writer task memory, Creator type restoration, Polisher restoration, and Recents fallback

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
tree=ast.parse(source)
html_value=None
for item in tree.body:
    if isinstance(item,(ast.Assign,ast.AnnAssign)):
        targets=item.targets if isinstance(item,ast.Assign) else [item.target]
        if any(isinstance(t,ast.Name) and t.id=='HTML' for t in targets):
            html_value=ast.literal_eval(item.value)
            break
assert isinstance(html_value,str), 'HTML constant not found'
start=html_value.index('<!-- KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_CLEANUP_V1_HTML_START -->')
end=html_value.index('<!-- KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_CLEANUP_V1_HTML_END -->',start)
home=html_value[start:end]
required_home=(
    'What would you like to write?',
    'CONTINUE WHERE YOU LEFT OFF',
    'Create a Poem or Short Story',
    'Poem remains the default; Short story is one simple choice inside.',
    'Polish a Poem',
    'Polish a Short Story',
    'The Weaver',
    'Story Forge',
    'World Builder',
    'My Writing',
    'Advanced and Technical Writer Tools',
    "openWriterCreatorFromHome()",
    "openWriterRoomFromHome('weaver','weaver')",
    "openWriterRoomFromHome('storyforge','storyforge')",
    "openWriterRoomFromHome('worldbuilder','worldbuilder')",
    "openWriterRoomFromHome('mywriting','mywriting')",
)
missing=[item for item in required_home if item not in home]
assert not missing, 'Writer home label/route markers missing: '+', '.join(missing)
required_action_memory=(
    "rememberWriterTask(story?'short_story_creator':'poem_creator');",
    "rememberWriterTask(story?'short_story_polisher':'poem_polisher');",
    "rememberWriterTask('weaver');",
    "rememberWriterTask('storyforge');",
    "rememberWriterTask('worldbuilder');",
    "rememberWriterTask('poem_polisher');",
    "rememberWriterTask('short_story_polisher');",
)
missing=[item for item in required_action_memory if item not in html_value]
assert not missing, 'exact creative-action memory hooks missing: '+', '.join(missing)
assert 'localStorage' in html_value
assert 'Navigation memory only' in home
assert 'Opening a room changes nothing.' in home
print('KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_CLEANUP_1_0_HOME_LABELS_ROUTES_AND_ACTION_MEMORY_OK')
validations.name: Verify calm Writer home labels, routes, and creative-action memory hooks
